semantic.role: Infrastructure facade providing path sanitization and containment validation for MCP tool file inputs.
responsibilities: Validate that tool-provided file paths are safe: reject null bytes, absolute paths, and path-traversal ("..") segments.
Normalize and return a relative file path that can be safely used within the project workspace.
Assert that a resolved absolute path remains within a designated parent directory to prevent directory escapes.
Throw typed ArchSpineError with ErrorCodes.McpToolInvalidArguments when validation fails.
outOfScope: MCP tool request routing or argument parsing beyond the filePath parameter.
invariants: Every returned path is relative and normalized (posix forward slashes, no null bytes, no absolute prefix).
Every call to assertPathWithinParent guarantees the resolved path is a child of the supplied parent directory.
All validation failures throw ArchSpineError with the McpToolInvalidArguments error code.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Isolate and secure file path handling from MCP tools, providing a stable validation surface that internal callers can depend on.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: No direct evidence of change to this module from the provided git history (commit primarily affects template files and language data).

publicSurface.description: Validates and normalizes a raw file path from an MCP tool, rejecting null bytes, absolute paths, and path traversal segments; returns a clean relative path.
Confirms that a resolved absolute path is contained within a specified parent directory; throws if the path escapes or is outside the boundary.

English.role: Infrastructure facade providing path sanitization and containment validation for MCP tool file inputs.
responsibilities: Validate that tool-provided file paths are safe: reject null bytes, absolute paths, and path-traversal ("..") segments.
Normalize and return a relative file path that can be safely used within the project workspace.
Assert that a resolved absolute path remains within a designated parent directory to prevent directory escapes.
Throw typed ArchSpineError with ErrorCodes.McpToolInvalidArguments when validation fails.
outOfScope: MCP tool request routing or argument parsing beyond the filePath parameter.

exports.name: assertPathWithinParent
exports.signature:
assertPathWithinParent(
  toolName: string,
  resolvedPath: string,
  parentDir: string,
)
